Bash(STORE=375d5737-069b-42f0-9791-1cc8390c0993
curl -s "http://localhost:7001/api/v1/stores/$STORE/products?pageSize=5" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']
for p in data:
    mp = p['pricing'].get\('memberPrice'\)
    ms = p['pricing'].get\('memberSavingsAmount'\)
    if mp:
        print\(f\\"{p['product']['name']}: ₹{p['pricing']['effectivePrice']} \(member: ₹{mp}, save ₹{ms}\)\\"\)
    else:
        print\(f\\"{p['product']['name']}: ₹{p['pricing']['effectivePrice']} \(no member price\)\\"\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(STORE=375d5737-069b-42f0-9791-1cc8390c0993
curl -s "http://localhost:7001/api/v1/stores/$STORE/products?pageSize=50" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']
found = 0
for p in data:
    mp = p['pricing'].get\('memberPrice'\)
    ms = p['pricing'].get\('memberSavingsAmount'\)
    if mp:
        found += 1
        print\(f\\"{p['product']['name']}: ₹{p['pricing']['effectivePrice']} \(member: ₹{mp}, save ₹{ms}\)\\"\)
print\(f'\\nTotal products with member pricing: {found}/{len\(data\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
